personal.name: Rui Jin

seo.siteDescription: Portfolio of Rui Jin, a creative software engineer focused on AI product engineering, full-stack development, automation, and computer vision.

projects.title: TrashLion SaaS Landing Page
projects.description: Responsive, conversion-focused landing page built for a SaaS product with modern UI, clear messaging, and production-ready delivery.
projects.longDescription: Built a polished SaaS landing page focused on clarity, responsiveness, and conversion. The project emphasized clean front-end execution, strong user experience, and reliable communication flows.
features: Responsive design across desktop and mobile
Conversion-oriented layout and calls to action
Clean, modern UI built for performance and clarity

projects.title: Object Detection System
projects.description: AI-powered real-time marine object detection from drone footage using computer vision and YOLO-based models.
projects.longDescription: Developed a real-time detection system for drone footage that identifies and tracks marine objects using computer vision pipelines, model inference, and monitoring workflows.
features: Drone integration for live capture workflows

projects.title: Photo Protection System
projects.description: AI-based protection system for Instagram photos using image recognition and watermarking techniques.
projects.longDescription: Created a protection workflow for visual content that detects unauthorized use, applies watermark strategies, and helps manage image ownership through an accessible dashboard experience.

projects.title: GitHub Scraping Tool
projects.description: Real-time GitHub data scraper with interactive dashboards for analysis and reporting.
projects.longDescription: Built a data collection and reporting tool that scrapes GitHub activity in real time and presents it through dashboards designed for exploration, insights, and operational visibility.

testimonials.name: Tilman Schmidt
testimonials.content: Rui's ability to solve complex problems and deliver results on time is truly impressive. He is a valuable asset to any team.

about: I am a software engineer with a strong foundation in AI, machine learning, and modern web development. I build products that balance technical reliability, performance, and thoughtful user experience.

My work spans full-stack applications, automation systems, AI integrations, and interactive front-end experiences. I am especially interested in practical LLM systems, production-ready ML workflows, and scalable cloud-based solutions.
